commonAnnotations.summary: FreeStorageSpace on orders-prod dropped below 10 GB threshold. Storage autoscaling triggered and volume has been expanded.
commonAnnotations.error: FreeStorageSpace fell below 10 GB warning threshold at 15:08Z. Storage autoscaling completed expansion at 15:14Z.
commonAnnotations.suspected_symptom: Brief write latency increase observed during the storage-full window. Alert is being investigated for root cause and recurrence risk.
